papers.title: Advances in Flexible Robotic Manipulator Systems—Part I: Overview and Dynamics Modeling Methods
papers.abstract: Flexible robotic manipulators (FRMs) exhibit advantages over traditional rigid-body manipulators, including lower energy consumption, faster response, enhanced safety, reduced spatial footprint, and greater payload-to-weight ratio.
papers.notes: 柔性机械臂系统的综述文章，包含动力学建模方法概述
